description:
Recto and verso: Court record written and signed by Hillel b. ʿEli. Dated: Thursday, 23 Ḥeshvan 1410 Seleucid = 21 October 1098 CE. Containing an agreement between Abū l-Munā and Abū l-Faḍl regarding a debt of 55 dinars, 35 of which were to be paid immediately and the remaining 20 at the middle of Kislev. Also signed by Shelomo b. Yosef Av ha-Kohen and Yiṣḥaq b. Shemuel. (Information mainly from Mediterranean Society, II, p. 512, and from Goitein's index cards.)

There is an addendum or subsequent court record, in a different hand (see PGPID 40211).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
